modal.title: Import calendar event
modal.drop_hint: Drag a calendar event from Outlook, or click to browse for a .ics file.
command.name: Import meeting note from calendar invite
notice.no_data: Meeting Note Importer: no data in the drop.
notice.no_calendar: Meeting Note Importer: could not extract calendar data from the drop.
notice.read_failed: Meeting Note Importer: failed to read the file.
notice.parse_failed: Meeting Note Importer: failed to parse {{name}} — {{err}}
notice.create_failed: Meeting Note Importer: failed to create note — {{err}}
settings.heading: Meeting Note Importer
settings.active_folder.name: Save in active folder
settings.active_folder.desc: Save the note in the folder of the currently open file. When no file is open, falls back to the Notes folder below.
settings.folder.name: Fallback notes folder
settings.folder.desc: Vault folder used when 'Save in active folder' is off, or when no file is open. Leave empty to save to the vault root.
settings.template.name: Template file
settings.template.desc: Path to an Obsidian template file using {{date}} and {{title}} placeholders. Leave empty to use the built-in template.
settings.note_name_template.name: Note name template
settings.note_name_template.desc: Template for the filename of the created note. Uses {{placeholder}} syntax — the same as your template file. Leave empty to use the default.
settings.note_name_template.variables: Available variables — date: YYYY-MM-DD, times: HH:mm 24-hour (all local timezone):
settings.attendees_heading.name: Attendees heading
settings.attendees_heading.desc: Exact heading line under which the attendee list is injected.
settings.notes_heading.name: Notes heading
settings.notes_heading.desc: Exact heading line under which the meeting URL and description are injected.
settings.open_after.name: Open note after creation
settings.open_after.desc: Automatically open the newly created meeting note.
settings.override_rename_default.name: Rename note by default when overriding
settings.override_rename_default.desc: When overriding the current note, automatically enable the rename toggle so the file is also renamed to match the meeting.
notice.override_conflict: Meeting Note Importer: cannot rename — a different note already has that name.
settings.time_increment.name: Time increment
settings.time_increment.desc: Default duration for manual meeting entries and start-time rounding
